title: Visualization of a Planar Graph and its Geometric Dual
description: This diagram illustrates the concept of a geometric dual by showing a planar graph and the construction of its dual graph, highlighting the one-to-one correspondence between faces and vertices.
relationships: A dual vertex is placed inside each face of the original graph
A dual edge crosses each original edge, connecting the dual vertices in the two adjacent faces
The dual graph G* is itself a planar graph
